GYEON Q²M KneelMat

Features:
- Gyeon kneeling mat makes work easier
- Made from dense 2 cm thick foam
- Foldable and therefore easy to store
- Great for any knee and joint
- Dimensions: 60 cm x 35 cm

Price: 30,00 € (incl. 19% VAT, plus shipping costs)

Availability: Available immediately
Delivery time: 1 - 3 Workdays (DE - int. shipments may differ)

Description:
Are you tired of being frustrated with sore knees every time you polish the lower parts of a car or clean wheels? Here is the solution for you! The foldable Q²M KneelMat made of thick (2 cm) and very dense foam is the ultimate aid in your daily detailing routine. Your knees will thank you!

sources.page_title: GYEON Q2M Kneel Mat - The Microfiber Shop
sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q2M Kneel Mat

Price: Rs. 1,799.00
Shipping calculated at checkout.

Product Images:
https://themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/GYEON_Q2M_Kneel_Mat.jpg?v=1759921308
https://themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/KneelMat.jpg?v=1759921308

Q2M Kneel Mat - Foldable Detailing Kneeling Mat

The GYEON Q2M Kneel Mat is a durable, foldable kneeling pad designed to protect your knees during detailing work. Made from dense 2 cm foam, it reduces strain while polishing lower panels, cleaning wheels, or working on interiors—making car care more comfortable and efficient.

Key Features:
- Ergonomic Comfort – Thick 2 cm dense foam protects knees and joints during detailing.
- Foldable & Portable – Easy to carry, store, and use anywhere.
- Durable Construction – Built to withstand daily use in professional or home detailing.
- Multi-Purpose Use – Perfect for polishing, wheel cleaning, and interior detailing.
- Large Working Area – 60 cm x 35 cm surface for stability and coverage.

Highlights:
- Prevents knee soreness during extended detailing sessions.
- Lightweight, compact, and easy to store in the garage or detailing kit.
- Complements GYEON's professional detailing accessories.
- Suitable for automotive, marine, and household tasks.

Areas of Application:
- Automotive Detailing – Polishing lower panels, side skirts, bumpers.
- Wheel & Tire Cleaning – Protects knees while scrubbing wheels.
- Household Use – Great for gardening, home repairs, or cleaning.
- Marine Detailing – Kneeling on decks or low sections of boats.

Warnings & Safe Tips:
- Do not use on sharp or abrasive surfaces that may damage the foam.
- Keep away from open flames or high heat.
- Store folded in a dry area to maintain durability.

Pro Tip: Pair the Q2M Kneel Mat with Q2M Wheel Covers and Q2M Steering Wheel Cover for a complete professional detailing setup that keeps both you and the vehicle protected.

Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 116138

Price: $34.99 (Tax included)

Product Image:
https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116138.jpg?v=1717826652

Description:
Protect your knees while detailing your car with the Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat. Made from high-quality materials, this durable mat is the perfect addition to your detailing arsenal.

Features & Benefits:
- Soft and comfortable surface protects your knees while detailing
- High-quality materials ensure long-lasting durability
- Waterproof and easy to clean
- Compact size makes it easy to store and transport
- Stylish Gyeon logo

The Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat is the perfect accessory for anyone who spends a lot of time detailing their car. Made from high-quality materials, this mat is designed to protect your knees while you work. Whether you're washing your car, polishing the paintwork, or applying wax, the Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat will provide a soft and comfortable surface for you to kneel on.

In addition to its comfortable surface, the Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat is also incredibly durable. It is made from high-quality materials that are designed to withstand the rigours of detailing. This means that you can use it time and time again without having to worry about it wearing out or breaking down.

The Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat is also waterproof and easy to clean. If it gets dirty during use, simply wipe it down with a damp cloth and it will be as good as new. And when you're finished using it, you can roll it up and store it in a compact space, making it easy to transport to and from your detailing location.

The Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat features a stylish Gyeon logo on its surface, making it a great addition to any detailing setup.

How to Use:

Step 1: Choose a Safe and Comfortable Surface
Choose a flat and stable surface to place the Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat on. Make sure the surface is clean and free of any debris or sharp objects that could damage the mat or your knees.

Step 2: Place the Kneel Mat
Place the Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat on the surface you've chosen, with the Gyeon logo facing up. You can also use the mat as a seat cushion by flipping it over and using the plain black side.

Step 3: Kneel Comfortably
When you need to kneel down to work on your car or any other task, use the Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat to protect your knees and provide a comfortable surface to work on. The mat is made of high-quality foam that provides excellent cushioning and support.

Step 4: Clean and Store the Mat
When you're finished using the Gyeon Q2M Kneel Mat, wipe it down with a damp cloth to remove any dirt or debris. Let it air dry completely before storing it in a cool and dry place, away from direct sunlight.
